# gsm_environment (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lookup environment by ID
data "gsm_environment" "by_id" {
  environment_id = "7c9e6679-7425-40de-944b-e07fc1f90ae7"
}

# Lookup environment by name (requires project_id)
data "gsm_environment" "by_name" {
  project_id = "d290f1ee-6c54-4b01-90e6-d701748f0851"
  name       = "production"
}

# Use the environment data
output "environment_project_id" {
  value = data.gsm_environment.by_name.project_id
}

output "environment_description" {
  value = data.gsm_environment.by_name.description
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `environment_id` (String) Environment ID to lookup
- `name` (String) Environment name to lookup. Requires project_id to be set.
- `project_id` (String) Project ID where the environment belongs. Required when using name lookup.
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the environment
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `default` (String)
